todos.content: Gas issue: executeBatchSwap sends txs with no gas limit — Relay quote includes stale maxFeePerGas that wallets reject as too high. Must estimate gas per step before sending.

Latency issue: executeBatchSwap does a full re-scan of ALL selected tokens via scanTokenSecurity (GoPlus + Moralis + honeypot.is) right before signing — this takes 10-30s and blocks the signature prompt.
Latency issue: executeSwap calls switchChain (non-async) then does await sleep(500) — should use switchChainAsync and await it properly.
Security issue: Moralis possible_spam filter only runs in the fallback path (when Alchemy finds 0 tokens). When Alchemy succeeds, Moralis spam flag is never checked on those tokens.
Security issue: scanTokenSecurity honeypot.is step runs tokens one-by-one sequentially — slow and misses tokens when rate limited. Run in parallel.
Gas issue: executeBatchSwap sends txs with no gas limit — Relay quote includes stale maxFeePerGas that wallets reject as too high. Must estimate gas per step before sending.

Latency issue: executeBatchSwap does a full re-scan of ALL selected tokens via scanTokenSecurity (GoPlus + Moralis + honeypot.is) right before signing — this takes 10-30s and blocks the signature prompt.
Latency issue: executeSwap calls switchChain (non-async) then does await sleep(500) — should use switchChainAsync and await it properly.
Security issue: Moralis possible_spam filter only runs in the fallback path (when Alchemy finds 0 tokens). When Alchemy succeeds, Moralis spam flag is never checked on those tokens.
Security issue: scanTokenSecurity honeypot.is step runs tokens one-by-one sequentially — slow and misses tokens when rate limited. Run in parallel.
